title: The Disappearance of the Taman Shud Case

scenes.text: A mysterious body found with a cryptic note haunts Australia.
This perplexing case occurred in Adelaide, South Australia.
In 1948, an unidentified man was found dead with a scrap of paper in his pocket.
The note contained a code that has stumped experts for decades.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED MYSTERY

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 Adelaide, Australia - 1948. An unidentifiable man was found dead at Somerton Beach with a cryptic note leading to an enduring mystery. Follow for daily cold cases!
